label: Folk
description: Manage contacts, pipelines, and relationship intelligence inside Folk's people-first CRM.

form.title: Connect Folk
form.subtitle: Paste your Folk API key to give Anton access to your contacts and pipelines.

methods.label: API Key
methods.description: Paste a Folk API key from Settings → Developers. The simplest and fastest way to connect — no OAuth setup required.
methods.how_to:
## Generate a Folk API Key

1. Open [folk](https://app.folk.app) and log in.
2. Click your workspace name or avatar in the bottom-left corner to open workspace settings.
3. Navigate to **Settings → Developers**.
4. Click **Create API key** (or **New key**).
5. Give it a name like `Anton` so you can identify it later.
6. Copy the key — it is shown once. Paste it into the **API Key** field below.

## Notes

- The API key grants access to the contacts, pipelines, and notes visible to the account that created it.
- If you lose the key, revoke it in the same Developers panel and create a new one.
- Rotating the key will break the Anton integration until you paste the replacement key here.

fields.name: api_key
fields.label: API Key
fields.description: Found in Folk → Settings → Developers. Keep this secret — it grants full API access to your workspace.
